Off Calendar Mar-23-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-01-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Extending The Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction Beyond 120 Days From Appointment
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Extending the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction behond 120 Days is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is ordered extended to 5/21/2004. Court was notified by plaintiff's counsel that case has settled. Court ordered Case set for an OSC re: CRC 225 on 5/18/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR#3058. (212)
